🎙️ Message from the MD

Welcome to the Aditi Tracking Knowledge Base Portal

Dear Aditi Tracking Team,Think of global brands like McDonald's 🍔 — known for delivering consistent quality, service, and experience worldwide. This level of excellence comes from clear systems, defined processes, and empowered people.

At Aditi Tracking, we are building the same standard.This portal is created for you — your personal platform to learn, grow, and succeed independently 🚀. Here, you can access SOPs, checklists, KPIs, role clarity, and growth paths — all in one place.

We believe in transparency 🤝, continuous learning 📘, and equal opportunities for everyone to grow.Today, we are proud to be among India’s leading telematics companies 🇮🇳. Tomorrow, we aim to become the world’s number one 🌍 — and that journey begins with you.

Let’s build excellence together.

Chirag Rachh Founder & Managing Director

Aditi Tracking Support Pvt Ltd

Founded Aditi Tracking Support Pvt. Ltd. (ATSPL) · 2011 · Mumbai, India
🏆 Performer of the Month April 2026
⏳ Loading performers...
📖 How to Use This Portal
1
Login with your credentials
Use your official Aditi email ID and the password shared by MIS. Contact MIS if you face login issues.
2
Navigate via the left sidebar
Click Dashboards to expand live dashboards and the all company system is there
3
Use filters & search
Each dashboard has date, person, and keyword filters. Use the Reset button to clear all active filters at once.
4
Access Training & Documents
Click Training for module-wise video guides or Documents for HR policies, SOPs and the org chart.
5
Refresh data anytime
Hit the Refresh button on any dashboard header to fetch the latest data from the Google Sheet source.

🏢Our Story

Aditi Tracking Support Pvt. Ltd. (ATSPL) was founded in 2011 by Chirag Rachh, who after losing his job at a telecom company decided to embark on an entrepreneurial journey. Driven by a passion for telematics and GPS technology, he founded Aditi Tracking with a single-minded focus on success.

Since 2011, Aditi Tracking has established itself as a trusted name among the top GPS tracking companies in India, specialising in advanced GPS tracking solutions that help businesses monitor commercial fleets, reduce operational costs, and enhance safety.

💎Core Values
⭐
Excellence
Setting high standards, continuously seeking to improve
🛡️
Reliable
Trustworthy solutions, consistently delivering on promises
🤝
Commitment
Dedicated to customers' success and goals
💫
Service
Exceptional service, going above and beyond
🔭Our Vision

To Become the Globally Trusted Partner for Businesses, Providing Advanced Telematics Solutions that Drive Operational Excellence, Cost Savings, and Sustainable Growth, while Delivering Unmatched Accuracy, Reliability, and Insight.

🎯Our Mission

Revolutionizing Connectivity with Advanced Telematics and IoT Solutions, We Are Committed to Delivering Excellence and Prompt, Reliable Service. From GPS fleet management to Cool Bus and ClickTask — innovation at every step.

🏆Company Milestones — 15-Years Journey
2011
Birth of the Leader
Chirag Rachh founded Aditi Tracking Support Pvt. Ltd. (ATSPL) in Mumbai after a decade in telecom. GPS tracking for commercial fleets was the core focus.
2012
Geographic Expansion
Started operations in Pune, Nagpur & Indore — taking Aditi's telematics solutions beyond Mumbai.
2014
Government Partnerships
Aditi partners with Government Projects, marking a major step towards large-scale fleet compliance solutions.
2016
Fuel Monitoring Pioneer
First to introduce Fuel Monitoring Solution — a breakthrough in reducing fuel theft and operational costs for fleets.
2017
Global Recognition
Franchise operations launched. Participated in Global EXPO events — Dubai, ZYTEX, HKTDC — establishing international presence.
2018
Public Sector Vehicle Fleet
Opportunity to work with 20+ PSVs (Public Service Vehicles) — expanding government & institutional client base.
2019
Quality Certifications
Acquired ISO Certification & CMMI Level 3 certification — validating process excellence and quality commitment.
2020
AIS 140 Compliance
Aditi Tracking gets AIS 140 Certified — government-mandated GPS standard for commercial vehicles in India.
2021
Goa Operations Launch
Expanded to Goa, serving North & South Goa's growing commercial fleet market.
2022
Ahmedabad Office
Launched Gujarat operations from Ahmedabad — strengthening West India presence.
2023
Cool Bus Solution Launch
Launched Cool Bus — an advanced school bus tracking and student safety solution, entering the education sector.
2024
CommutePulse & WasteTrail
Launched CommutePulse for employee transport tracking and WasteTrail for waste management fleet solutions.
2026
Aditi Tracking Portal
Internal Knowledge based portal launched — unified command centre to track, train and grow.
🔵Brand Colors
Aditi Gold / Accent
#f0a500 · rgb(240,165,0)
Primary brand color — CTAs, highlights, badges
Dark / Primary Text
#222222 · rgb(34,34,34)
Body text, headings on light backgrounds
White / Backgrounds
#ffffff · rgb(255,255,255)
Background, cards, clean surfaces
Teal / Secondary
#14b8a6 · rgb(20,184,166)
Documents, secondary accents
🔤Typography
Aditi Tracking
PRIMARY HEADING — Playfair Display (Serif)
Use for: Portal headings, marketing headlines
Tracking intelligence for India
BODY / UI — DM Sans (Sans-serif)
Use for: Dashboard text, labels, buttons, body copy
🖼️Logo Usage Guidelines
✅ Correct Usage
✓ Use on white or light grey backgrounds
✓ Maintain minimum clear space equal to the logo height on all sides
✓ Use the full colour logo (gold + dark text) for primary use
✓ Use white version on dark or coloured backgrounds
✓ Download from company brand assets folder (contact IT)
❌ Do NOT do this
✗ Do not stretch, skew or distort the logo
✗ Do not change the logo colours or add effects
✗ Do not place logo on busy or clashing backgrounds
✗ Do not use outdated or unofficial logo versions
✗ Do not use below 40px height (legibility minimum)
💬Official Taglines
"India's Leading Telematics Company" — Primary tagline · All external communication
"Track and Manage Your Assets Like a Pro with Aditi Tracking!" — Marketing collateral, brochures
"We don't just promise; we deliver." — Founder quote · Internal culture, customer pitches
